goal: Compare SGD vs Adam vs AdamW optimizers for training a 3-layer MLP on MNIST digit classification. Use raw PyTorch (no HuggingFace). Train for 5 epochs with 5000 training samples, test on 1000 samples. Seeds 42, 123, 456. Report accuracy and convergence speed.
